previewDescription: This is how organization members see your profile.
headline: Headline
avatarUrlHint: Or paste a direct link to an image
emailVisibilityHint: Your login email is never shown unless you opt in.
timezoneVisibilityHint: When enabled, members who share an organization with you can see your local time.
pendingInvitationsDescription: You have been invited to join the organizations below. Accept to become a member.
membershipsDescription: Organizations where you are an active member. You can leave any organization you no longer wish to belong to.
leaveOrganizationConfirm: Leave {{name}}? You will lose access to organization documents and activity.
leaveOrganizationConfirmRep: Leave {{name}}? A replacement election will be created for the remaining representatives before you leave.
leaveOrganizationSuccessWithElection: You have left the organization. Remaining representatives should start the replacement election in Governance.
cannotLeaveLastRepresentative: You cannot leave as the last active representative. Invite or promote another representative first.

notifications.pushDescription: Receive browser alerts for time-critical events and digest summaries.
notifications.pushStatusBlocked: Blocked — enable notifications in your browser settings
notifications.pushStatusUnsupported: Not supported on this device or browser
notifications.pushImmediateDescription: Get notified right away when voting starts or deadlines approach.
notifications.pushDigestDescription: Receive compact summaries of non-critical activity (uses your digest email frequency).
notifications.pushBlockedHint: Notifications are blocked. Allow them in your browser settings and try again.

telegram.title: Telegram Notifications
telegram.description: Receive alerts and digest summaries in Telegram when your account is linked.
telegram.statusLinking: Waiting for you to confirm in Telegram…
telegram.statusNotConfigured: Telegram bot is not configured on this server
telegram.immediateDescription: Get notified right away when voting starts or deadlines approach.
telegram.digestDescription: Receive compact summaries of non-critical activity (uses your digest email frequency).
telegram.linkOpened: Telegram opened — tap Start in the bot to finish linking
telegram.notConfiguredHint: Telegram notifications are not available on this server
